title: combretum viscosum
intro: Combretum viscosum, also known as sticky combretum, is a shrub-like plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Combretaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Combretum viscosum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Combretum viscosum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
